service.title: Phasma3D Viewer
service.description: A collaborative 3D visualisation environment that resolves an RHDT project into its constituent entity instances (3D models, annotations, actor information) and renders them in a browser-based interface. Supports both client-side rendering via WebGL for mid-/high-tier devices and server-side remote rendering for large fragment collections and thin clients, enabling realistic illumination of results compatible with physical inspection. Includes 3D annotation tools (via ARTEMIS Annotation Services BEAS-01), geometry optimisation with Level of Detail (LOD) processing for 3D format conversion, and collaborative multi-user interaction. Server-side rendering is provided by AUEB-RC as an external Remote Rendering Server node.

access_point.notes: Browser-based WebGL 2 rendering interface. Compatible GPU with WebGL 2 support required on the client side.
Integration with ARTEMIS cloud data and services including authentication and data management.

intended_for.audience: Heritage scientists and conservators engaged in collaborative 3D model inspection and annotation
Expert users requiring remote, real-time collaborative work on 3D representations of heritage assets
Users of RHDT pilots requiring 3D visualisation with multi-user access

activity.activity_label: operation_05 — Spatiotemporal Data Visualisation and VR/AR Experience: rendering the 3D models of the Japanese Tower ('as-is' and 'as-built') within the RHDT platform and overlaying environmental data layers

used_physical_object_of_type.object_type: Desktop or laptop computer with modern GPU supporting WebGL 2
Server with NVIDIA RTX class GPU (min. 12GB VRAM, DLSS and OptiX denoiser support; indicative: RTX4090, RTX5090) for remote rendering — provided by AUEB-RC
Server with min. 8 CPU cores (Intel i7/i9), min. 32GB RAM, min. 500GB storage for remote rendering

has_functionality.functionality: RHDT project resolution into entity instances (3D models, annotations, actors)
Server-side remote rendering for large fragment collections and thin clients
Realistic visualisation and illumination of 3D results
3D annotations (highlighting, sticky notes, comments) via ARTEMIS Annotation Services BEAS-01
3D format conversion and Level of Detail (LOD) processing for geometry optimisation

sub_service.sub_service_title: Remote Rendering Service (AUEB-RC external RRS node)
